chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1789 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-04-2023 Mr. Allah Dino Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Wazir Ali Behan, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Mirwah is present and files statement that he equipped the charge of his office in September, 2022 and during his posting, the petitioner never approached him for redressal of his grievance. It is further stated that as and when the petitioner approaches him with his written application for changing of Foti Khata, he will redress the grievance of the petitioner after observing all codal formalities. Statement is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner, who on being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition in the light of statement filed by the respondent No.2. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
